[vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” css=”.vc_custom_1602075131447{margin-top: 40px !important;margin-bottom: 40px !important;}”][vc_column width=”1/3″ el_class=”contact_us”][vc_column_text]

Corporate contact information:

Exoxemis, Inc. P.O. Box 7570
Little Rock AR 72217[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”2/3″ css=”.vc_custom_1566373377036{padding-left: 20px !important;}”][vc_column_text]We welcome inquiries regarding our company, licensing, alliances and product development. For more information, please contact businessdevelopment@exoxemis.online.

For inquiries regarding scientific or clinical collaborations as well as requests for science literature or reprints, please contact admin@exoxemis.online.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” equal_height=”yes” content_placement=”middle” disable_element=”yes” css=”.vc_custom_1567529935958{padding-top: 50px !important;padding-bottom: 50px !important;background-color: #074575 !important;}”][vc_column width=”3/4″][vc_column_text]

we’re very excited about it’s potential, contact us today

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/4″ css=”.vc_custom_1566464294166{padding-top: 0px !important;}”]

Learn More
[/vc_column][/vc_row]

@graph.name: Contact-US - Exoxemis - a biomedical research company focused on the study and commercialization of a topical biological antiseptic system utilizing Myeloperoxidase (MPO).
Exoxemis - a biomedical research company focused on the study and commercialization of a topical biological antiseptic system utilizing Myeloperoxidase (MPO).
@graph.description: Myeloperoxidase (MPO) and eosinophil peroxidase (EPO) enzymes work to preferentially kill a broad range of pathogens through a unique mechanism of action unlikely to induce resistance.
